'''Graak''' was a cunning [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] warrior from [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]].<ref name="rotj" />

He was also aggressive and militaristic. He had gray and black fur and black eyes.

==Biography==
Graak was part of the hunting party that captured [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].<ref name="rotj" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
An action figure based on Graak was released in 2007. However, He has bow instead of a club and the sculpting more closely resembles [[Lumat/Legends|Lumat]].

[[File:Graak.png|thumb|right|Ewok previously identified as Graak.]]
Both the Decipher CCG and [[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]s identified a single Ewok as Graak. However, later sources including ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and the ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection]]'' identify a similar Ewok as Graak.
